texto: Ruthie started to cry at Julia's use of the word "hate," though Ruthie knew it was true, accurate. For a long time now it had been easier just to hate her sister. Easier to try to define the relationship with that simple emotion than to live with the conflicting set of feelings Julia brought forth.
explicacao: Citação de Susan Rebecca White sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Ruthie started to cry at Julia's use of the word "hate," though Ruthie knew it was true, accurate…” articula tempo, denial, hate em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como hate e sisters.
